subcodes.title: Words spoken at Rue St. Didier 30 in Paris, 1913-02-19
subcodes.first_line: Once upon a time I was invited to a garden party outside of the fortress of Akka. There were about seventy guests including the governor
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @stories; anecdotes, @exhortations and counsels
